description: HEAD on registered workstream branch — Case A: proceed. No action, no message.
owning_behavior: STEP 0.0 Case A (R-MW-5, D29) — HEAD in registered set → proceed
expected_result: PASS — Case A fires; no HALT; no auto-checkout message; orchestrator advances to STEP 0.1
load_bearing_assertion: HEAD = feature/my-analytics. _streams/my-analytics/brief.md status=pending, branch=feature/my-analytics. Registered set = {feature/my-analytics}. HEAD in registered set → Case A. No HALT, no emit, proceed to STEP 0.1.
separates_from_defect_by: defect-case-a-skip-registered-check skips the registered-set read (set always empty) — on this Case A state, HEAD=feature/my-analytics not in empty set AND not master → Case E HALT fires. Golden: set built correctly, HEAD in set → Case A proceed (no HALT).
